name: NKCDC (New Kensington Community Development Corporation)
description_short: NKCDC (New Kensington Community Development Corporation) is a free credit assistance provider based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Rated 4.5/5 with 90 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
NKCDC (New Kensington Community Development Corporation) is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Carrying a 4.5/5.0 Google rating from 90 reviews, NKCDC (New Kensington Community Development Corporation) has an excellent reputation among consumers in the Philadelphia area looking to access free credit counseling and financial guidance.

NKCDC (New Kensington Community Development Corporation) specializes in free credit assistance services designed to help consumers access free credit counseling and financial guidance. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in Philadelphia offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. NKCDC (New Kensington Community Development Corporation) provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the Philadelphia, Pennsylvania area who are considering NKCDC (New Kensington Community Development Corporation) should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
